description: Active learned pattern IDs applied, semicolon separated

(V5.9.9) Day-1 reference bar shape field. Pass-through copy of close_pct_in_range from the dashboard files (bonde_focus_list / bonde_focus_exclusions / bonde_diagnostics) for the ticker on the row's signal_date, with skill pack close_pct_in_range as fallback. Captures where the close fell within the day's range (0 = at low, 100 = at high). Stockbee 'linear buying pressure' proxy. Pure data integrity field — not used in any gate or scoring logic. Blank if neither source provides the field for this row.

(V5.9.9) Day-1 reference bar shape field. Pass-through copy of move_pct from the dashboard files for the ticker on the row's signal_date, with skill pack mb_today_pct (or ep_today_pct per primary_setup) as fallback. Companion field for interpreting day1_close_pct_in_range. Pure data integrity field — not used in any gate or scoring logic. Blank if neither source provides the field for this row.

(V5.9.9) Day-1 reference bar shape field. Pass-through copy of vol_ratio from the dashboard files for the ticker on the row's signal_date, with skill pack mb_vol_ratio_50 (or ep_vol_ratio_50 per primary_setup) as fallback. Companion field for interpreting day1_close_pct_in_range. Pure data integrity field — not used in any gate or scoring logic. Blank if neither source provides the field for this row.

(V5.9.19) Final executable decision status. This is the only field humans or automation may treat as trade permission. Values: TRADE (non-council-routed actionable trade), COUNCIL (requires/has council review before action; includes B+ and A2 council-routed rows), WATCH (monitor only), REJECT (avoid/no trade), UNKNOWN (insufficient data). Dashboard tier is source focus tier only and must not override this field.
